item.title: Yeah, But What About the Private Prison Shareholders

item.title: Bottom shelf memes I found in the color blind detection book
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
If you're still here, you must like my taste in memes. Steal them straight from the source: discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We also stream on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
It's a trap.
Hiley the axolotl tax. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Robert Reich: "Shame on the Supreme Court for what it did today."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Some good news for Minnesota with one tiny problem.
item.description: That tiny problem being Republican Representative Drew Roach, father of three, who is the only individual who voted no, only measure to protect children from the implementation of AI. This bill makes it illegal for any AI to be used to undress children. This one should be a no-brainer, but here we are. Remember stories like these when it comes time for midterms. Republicans overwhelmingly majority are the people who harm kids with legislation and their own personal actions.. https://thedeepdive.ca/minnesota-ai-nudification-ban-hf1606/
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Wife sent me this. It say so much...
item.description: I mean, damn. He's not perfect in any way, has major issues like most other world leaders but still, to think he's not as bad as what we've got is... wow.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @jussi453 carved this and I think it's pretty badass. Check out more stuff in their posts!
27 Man Tax: David Call
"The greatest pleasure I know, is to do a good action by stealth, and to have it found out by accident." - Charles Lamb So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
